core_mechanism: representing an input path by its hierarchy of iterated integrals (the path signature / group-like element in the free tensor algebra) as a universal feature basis, and driving a controlled differential equation through this representation so that simple parametrizations can approximate any path-dependent evolution operator
brief_reason: The abstract builds its whole method on 'controlled differential equations whose vector fields factor through the signature map,' proving that such simply parametrized signature-driven equations universally approximate the solution of any well-posed path-dependent controlled dynamics.
